title: acosta pseudocineraria
intro: Acosta pseudocineraria is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the Pseudocineraria or False Cineraria. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with a rich history in traditional medicine, particularly in Latin America. Its extracts and essential oils have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
